recent_incidents.title: CRITICAL: Progressive Congestion — SLA Breach Imminent — branch-bengaluru
recent_incidents.description: Severe progressive congestion on branch-bengaluru. Utilization reached 89%. All traffic classes affected. EF queue saturated. Business-critical applications showing 111ms latency. Packet loss at 16.8%.
recent_incidents.impact: SLA breach in <15 minutes. ERP inaccessible. VoIP quality unacceptable.
recent_incidents.root_cause: Bulk backup job scheduled during business hours causing traffic burst
recent_incidents.resolution_action: Reverted QoS policy to approved template

active_predictions.reasoning: Rate of utilization increase (+4.1%/min) exceeds any seen in training data except INC-002 at T+30min.
active_predictions.recommended_action_1: URGENT: Switch non-critical traffic to alternate path now

recent_incidents.title: Interface Congestion Buildup — branch-chennai
recent_incidents.description: Gradual bandwidth utilization increase detected on branch-chennai. Link utilization climbed from 62% to 94% over 90 minutes. VoIP and video traffic experiencing quality degradation. Queue depth at 77% of maximum buffer capacity.
recent_incidents.impact: VoIP call quality degraded, video conferencing affected, ERP response times elevated
recent_incidents.root_cause: Sustained high traffic volume combined with insufficient QoS prioritization
recent_incidents.resolution_action: Reverted QoS policy to approved template

recent_incidents.title: BGP Route Flap — branch-chennai
recent_incidents.description: BGP neighbor instability detected at branch-chennai. Peer 10.1.2.1 flapped 10 times. 9 prefixes withdrawn and re-announced. Hold timer reduced to 58s. Downstream path rerouting observed on dependent branches.
recent_incidents.impact: Intermittent connectivity loss to 6 downstream sites. Route reconvergence in progress.
recent_incidents.root_cause: ISP maintenance without prior notification / physical layer instability
recent_incidents.resolution_action: Coordinated with ISP for physical layer repair

active_predictions.recommended_action_1: Increase BGP hold-time to 90s and enable route dampening

recent_incidents.title: CRITICAL: OSPF Adjacency Lost — branch-pune
recent_incidents.description: OSPF neighbor 10.1.4.1 went DOWN from FULL state at branch-pune. Dead interval expired. Interface TenGigabitEthernet0/0 not receiving OSPF Hellos. Routing table affected: 7 routes withdrawn.
recent_incidents.impact: Branch isolated from OSPF domain. Traffic blackholed until reconvergence.
recent_incidents.root_cause: Physical layer or MTU mismatch causing OSPF Hello failure
recent_incidents.resolution_action: Applied QoS rate-limiting on congested interface

active_predictions.reasoning: OSPF Hello interval jitter detected. Neighbor response time increasing beyond dead interval margin.
